inputs.label: Daily meat consumption
inputs.businessContext: Average amount of meat consumed per day in grams.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average amount of meat consumed per day in grams.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Günde tüketilen ortalama et miktarı (gram cinsinden).
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Menge an Fleisch, die pro Tag in Gramm verzehrt wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Quantité moyenne de viande consommée par jour en grammes.

inputs.label: Vegetarian days per week
inputs.businessContext: Number of days per week on a vegetarian diet.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of days per week on a vegetarian diet.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Haftada vejetaryen diyette geçirilen gün sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Tage pro Woche mit vegetarischer Ernährung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de jours par semaine suivant un régime végétarien.

inputs.label: Beef ratio
inputs.businessContext: Proportion of meat that is beef (higher environmental impact).

businessContext_i18n.en: Proportion of meat that is beef (higher environmental impact).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Etin sığır eti olan kısmı (daha yüksek çevresel etki).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anteil des Fleisches, der Rindfleisch ist (höhere Umweltbelastung).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Proportion de viande qui est du bœuf (impact environnemental plus élevé).

inputs.label: Pork ratio
inputs.businessContext: Proportion of meat that is pork.

businessContext_i18n.en: Proportion of meat that is pork.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anteil des Fleisches, der Schweinefleisch ist.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Proportion de viande qui est du porc.

inputs.label: Poultry ratio
inputs.businessContext: Proportion of meat that is poultry.

businessContext_i18n.en: Proportion of meat that is poultry.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Etin kümes hayvanı olan kısmının oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anteil des Fleisches, das Geflügel ist.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Proportion de viande qui est de la volaille.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
